traditional.title: Transferring to the University of Arizona Global Campus (UAGC)
traditional.body: At UAGC, we understand that learning can occur in many ways and places. We will work with you to review your previously earned credit to determine what may apply to your chosen degree. Prior to enrolling, ask your advisor about a pre-evaluation for an unofficial review of what may transfer. After enrollment, our Transcript Administrators will work with you to get your official transcripts on file for your official transfer credit evaluation.

traditional.title: Bachelor's
traditional.body: Transfer approved college credits toward your bachelor’s program at UAGC.

traditional.title: Master's
traditional.body: Transfer up to 9 approved credits towards a master's degree program at UAGC.

traditional.title: Doctoral
traditional.body: Transfer up to 30 approved credits towards a doctoral degree program at UAGC.

traditional.title: Partnerships for Success
traditional.subtitle: Accordion section
traditional.body: One of our passions at UAGC is helping community college graduates pursue their next degree while maximizing their previous credentials. With that in mind, and in the spirit of cooperation, UAGC has developed in-depth partnerships with select institutions to provide exciting opportunities for transfer students. If you earned your associate degree from, or are affiliated with one of our partners, visit their partner page for more details.

traditional.title: Central Arizona College
traditional.subtitle: Partnerships for Success
traditional.body: Central Arizona College graduates, employees, and employee families, may qualify to save up to $4,950 per year^ on bachelor’s degree tuition when transferring** to a flexible, 100% online degree program at UAGC. Additional benefits available to pursue a master’s degree. Learn More

traditional.title: Community College of the Air Force
traditional.subtitle: Partnerships for Success
traditional.body: UAGC participates in the CCAF: Air University Associate to Baccalaureate Cooperative (AU-ABC) program. To see how CCAF courses may transfer individually to UAGC, view the transfer guide . Learn More

traditional.title: Phi Theta Kappa
traditional.subtitle: Partnerships for Success
traditional.body: The University of Arizona Global Campus recognizes Phi Theta Kappa members as driven, high-achieving students. That’s why we’re excited to offer PTK alumni, advisors, as well as employees and their families up to $4,950 per year^ toward a bachelor’s degree at UAGC. Additional benefits available to pursue your master’s degree. Learn More

traditional.title: Saylor Academy
traditional.subtitle: Partnerships for Success
traditional.body: UAGC academic partner Saylor Academy creates a seamless transfer of course credit toward undergraduate programs. If you have taken courses at Saylor Academy and wish to continue your academic goals at UAGC, or you are attending UAGC and want to evaluate how courses may transfer from Saylor Academy, view the transfer guide . Learn More

traditional.title: Sophia Learning
traditional.subtitle: Partnerships for Success
traditional.body: UAGC has partnered with Sophia Learning, which offers self-paced courses that let you earn college credits on your schedule. Sophia’s platform is accessible anytime, anywhere, from your laptop, tablet, or mobile device. View the transfer guide to find the right courses that will help you complete your UAGC degree. Learn More

traditional.title: StraighterLine
traditional.subtitle: Partnerships for Success
traditional.body: UAGC academic partner StraighterLine creates a seamless transfer of course credit toward undergraduate programs. If you have taken courses at StraighterLine and wish to continue your academic goals at UAGC, or you are attending UAGC and want to evaluate how courses may transfer from StraighterLine, view the transfer guide . Learn More

traditional.title: Study.com
traditional.subtitle: Partnerships for Success
traditional.body: UAGC has partnered with Study.com, a leading online education platform helping learners of all ages excel academically and close skills gaps. UAGC students can choose from more than 200 general, core, and upper-level courses recommended for transfer by ACE and/or NCCRS, and seamlessly transfer them back to UAGC. View the transfer guide to see which courses are available to help you complete your UAGC degree. Learn More

traditional.title: What Other Types of Credits Will UAGC Accept?
traditional.subtitle: Accordion section
traditional.body: If you have not attended a traditional college or university, that’s OK! You may have other valuable experience that can turn into college credit. You may even be able to earn credits along the way, while taking UAGC courses.

traditional.title: Prior Learning Assessment
traditional.subtitle: What Other Types of Credits Will UAGC Accept?
traditional.body: You may pursue credit for your unique mix of work experience, previous corporate training, continuing education units, or other non-traditional sources of previous learning that do not carry approved-accredited traditional or ACE/NCCRS-recommended credit through UAGC Prior Learning Assessment (PLA). Students may pursue PLA credit through one or both of the options offered by UAGC: Sponsored Professional Training and Experiential Learning Credit Essay. Learn More

traditional.title: Military Training and Experience
traditional.subtitle: What Other Types of Credits Will UAGC Accept?
traditional.body: UAGC recognizes that students learn a lot from boot camp, basic training, officer training school, and many other courses provided by the military. Upon enrollment, UAGC will request your Joint Services Transcript (JST) along with any other college transcripts on your behalf. Learn More

traditional.title: Nationally Evaluated Courses
traditional.subtitle: What Other Types of Credits Will UAGC Accept?
traditional.body: Several organizations offer courses that have been recommended for college credit by national credit recommendation services, like American Council on Education (ACE) and National College Credit Recommendation Service (NCCRS). UAGC has created transfer guides for several popular providers. Don’t see an organization listed that offers training with recommended credit? Talk to your Academic Advisor on how those credits may apply. Learn More

traditional.title: National Testing Programs
traditional.subtitle: What Other Types of Credits Will UAGC Accept?
traditional.body: If you feel competent in a specific subject area, many organizations offer exams you can take for a fee. When you pass, you’ll earn recommended-college credit that may meet one of your unique remaining course requirements. Learn More

traditional.title: International Transfers
traditional.subtitle: What Other Types of Credits Will UAGC Accept?
traditional.body: The University of Arizona Global Campus (UAGC) values learning and understands our international students bring with them a unique mix of possible credits. When certain conditions are met, students may use their international schooling to meet admission requirements, and may receive transfer credit for their successfully completed, international, college-level credits. Learn More
